demo_reading_p: Umbhalo weqonga uzakuzilungisa ngokwawo. Oku kuphucula ukufundeka kubo bonke abasebenzisi.
profile_verify_deactivate_note: Isimo se-akhawunti yakho siya kutshintsha sibe 'AYISEBENZI'
profile_danger_desc: I-akhawunti yakho iya kucinywa ngokupheleleyo ibe kwisimo esithi AYISEBENZI.
profile_danger_final_confirm_msg: I-PIN iqinisekisiwe. Ngokuqinisekisa ngoku, iseshoni yakho iya kuvalwa kwangoko.

seo.title: Iingcebiso zoKhuseleko | Ulawulo lweNgingqi
seo.desc: Isikhokelo sokukhuselwa kwedatha kunye nokhuselo lwedijithali lwebandla.

security.hero_sub: Imikhwa ebalulekileyo yokukhusela imfihlo yakho kunye neenkcukacha zakho.

estafas.title: 1. Ubuqhophololo be-Intanethi
estafas.desc: Iziqulatho zedijithali ezingeyonyani zinokuxelisa amazwi kunye nobuso obaziwayo ukuba bumele iinkcukacha zakho okanye imali yakho.

tags.prevention_info: Ukuba unyanzeliswa ukuba unike imali okanye iinkcukacha eziyimfihlo: nqumama, cinga, kwaye uhlale uqinisekisa.
tags.verification_info: Yinqumle imbalelwano uze uzifonele ngokwakho loo mntu usebenzisa indlela ekhuselekileyo neyaziwayo.
tags.deepfake_info: Itekhnoloji yokulinganisa umntu. Ungathembi kuphela oko ukubonayo okanye ukuvayo kwiscreen.

physical.title: 2. Ukhuseleko lweFowuni
physical.desc: Ifowuni yakho sisitshixo esikhulu. Isixhobo esingenalo utshixo lwesikrini luyingango evulekileyo kubomi bakho obuyimfihlo.

tags.biometry_info: Misela ubuso (FaceID) okanye umnwe. Ikhuselekile kakhulu kune-pattern enokubonwa ngumntu egxalabeni lakho.
tags.updates_info: Ungayityesheli imiyalezo 'yohlelo olutsha'; badla ngokulungisa iimpazamo zokhuseleko ezifunyenwe mva nje.
tags.encryption_info: Qinisekisa ukuba ukhuseleko lwe-disk luyasebenza ukukhusela iifayile kunye neefoto zakho kubusela.

keys.title: 3. Amagama ayimfihlo anamandla
keys.desc: Phephela ukusebenzisa iinkcukacha ezaziwayo lula. Uninzi lohlaselo lwenzeka ngenxa ye-password ebuthathaka.

tags.2fa_info: Vula uqinisekiso lwamanyathelo amabini kuzo zonke ii-akhawunti zakho. Lulwaleko lokhuseleko olubaluleke kakhulu.
tags.robustness_info: Sebenzisa amabinzana amade endaweni yamagama alula. Umzekelo: 'Blue-Sky-2026!' ungcono kakhulu kune 'peter123'.
tags.passphrases_info: Amabinzana amade kunzima kakhulu kwiikhompyutha zabatshabalalisi ukuba bawanqamle namhlanje.

phishing.title: 4. Ukubona iGwegwe
phishing.desc: Izigebenga zenza ngathi zivela kwi-bank okanye kwi-technical support ukuze zibe iinkcukacha zakho ngokukoyikisa.

tags.urgency_info: Ukuba umyalezo uthi 'I-akhawunti yakho iza kuvalwa kwiyure enye', ngokuqinisekileyo bubuqhophololo.
tags.links_info: Jonga i-URL ngononophelo. Abaqhophololi badla ngokusebenzisa amagama afana ne 'g00gle.net' endaweni ye 'google.com'.
tags.files_info: Ungaze uvule iifayile ongazilindelanga, ngakumbi ukuba zineziphelo ezinje ngo .ZIP, .EXE, okanye .BAT.

family.title: 5. Ilifa laBantwana
family.desc: Abantwana abanalo ubulumko bokubona imigibe. Bafundise ukuba into efakwe kwi-intanethi ihlala apho ngonaphakade.

tags.identity_info: Phephela ukukhupha iinkcukacha eziyimfihlo kwiifoto zoluntu, njenge-uniform yesikolo okanye indawo okuyo.
tags.strangers_info: Umthetho wegolide kubantwana: 'Ukuba awubazi ngenkangeleko, asingobahlobo bokwenene'.
tags.privacy_info: Hlola rhoqo useto lwemfihlo lwe-social media kunye nezixhobo zamalungu osapho lwakho.

backup.title: 6. Ukugcinwa kweDatha
backup.desc: I-virus inokutshixa okanye icime iifayile zakho. Ikopi ekhuselekileyo ngokwenene yileyo ingadityaniswanga kwikhompyutha.

tags.frequency_info: Yenza ikopi yokhuseleko yeefoto zakho kunye namaxwebhu abalulekileyo kube kanye ngenyanga.
tags.disconnection_info: Khuphela iifayile zakho kwi-external drive uze uyikhuphe kwikhompyutha xa ugqibile.
tags.cloud_info: Sebenzisa iinkonzo ze-cloud ezinokhuseleko, kodwa ungathembeli kuzo kuphela njengekopi enye.
